description: Normalized (0-1) target positions measured from character-alignment.png. Pipeline-resolution-independent: applies to 960x960 dev output and 550x550 final delivery alike. Use scale_template.py to generate an overlay PNG at any resolution.
_heroSizesNote: Per-hero size category. Heroes not listed default to 'medium'. Compose applies sizeFactors[size] as a multiplier on the alignment scale, anchored at the ground line — characters all stand on the same in-game floor; larger ones grow upward from there.
